items.title: "Did the heating fail while we were away?"
items.desc: Homeowner returns from a 10-day trip, opens the app, jumps to the timeframe of the trip, sees the temperature line for the living room and confirms it stayed above 16 °C the whole time.

items.title: "The bedroom is freezing tonight"
items.desc: Mid-winter, 2 am. Bedroom drops to 11 °C, the alert fires on the phone, homeowner gets up to investigate before the pipes freeze.

items.title: "What does our heating cost actually buy us?"
items.desc: End of winter. Homeowner exports a year of CSV, drops it into a spreadsheet next to the gas bill, decides whether next year's boiler tune-up is worth it.
